_meta: Event entity schema — based on discovery analysis (14 sampled events, ~380 total events)

columns._meta: Fields are grouped by purpose. 'nullable' means the field is not present on all events.

wiki_page_title.description: Original wiki page title — used as the unique key for upserts (e.g., 'Secret_Wars_(1984_Event)')

image_url.description: Full CDN URL for the event's main image, resolved from wiki Image field via MediaWiki imageinfo API

creators.description: Event creators — cleaned from wiki links (e.g., 'Jim Shooter' or 'Jed MacKay; Pepe Larraz')

synopsis.description: Full event synopsis/history — can be very long for major events (500–15000+ characters)

locations.description: Key locations — cleaned from wiki links (e.g., 'Battleworld' or 'Xandar, Hala, Kyln')

protagonists.description: Heroes/protagonists — cleaned from wiki links, comma-separated

antagonists.description: Villains/antagonists — cleaned from wiki links, comma-separated

others.description: Neutral or other notable characters — cleaned from wiki links, comma-separated

first_issue.description: First issue of the event (e.g., 'Blood Hunt Vol 1 1')

last_issue.description: Last issue of the event (e.g., 'Blood Hunt Vol 1 5')

reading_order.description: Core event issues in reading order — newline-separated, collapsed from Part1–PartN fields

tie_ins.description: Tie-in issues — cleaned from wiki gallery markup, newline-separated

prelude.description: Prelude issues — cleaned from wiki gallery markup, newline-separated

notes.description: Continuity notes, follow-up references, editorial context

recommended.description: Recommended related reading — cleaned from wiki links, newline-separated

dropped_fields._meta: Fields from discovery that are intentionally excluded from the schema
dropped_fields.Links: External reference links — not structured data
dropped_fields.Wikipedia: Wikipedia article name — external reference, not entity data
dropped_fields.QuoteSource: Issue citation for quotation — redundant, the quote itself is sufficient
dropped_fields.Title: Duplicate of Name — only appeared in 1/14 samples

relationships._meta: These will be handled by join tables — defined separately after all entity schemas are finalized
relationships.character_events: From Protagonists/Antagonists/Others fields → join table with role (protagonist/antagonist/other)
relationships.comic_events: From reading_order + tie_ins fields → join table linking comics to events
